actions.name: ACTIVATE_N8N_WORKFLOW
actions.description: Activate an n8n workflow to start processing triggers and running automatically. Identifies workflows by ID, name, or semantic description in any language.

actions.name: ADD_TO_PLAYLIST
actions.description: Add music to a playlist after confirmed:true. If the track is not already in the library, the configured music fetch service must resolve it first. Creates the playlist if it does not exist.

actions.name: ASTROLOGY_READING
actions.description: Perform an astrological natal chart reading, progressively revealing planetary placements.

actions.name: AUTHENTICATE_GOOGLE
actions.description: Authenticate with Google to access Meet API

actions.name: BLUEBUBBLES_SEND_REACTION
actions.description: Add or remove a reaction on a message via BlueBubbles

actions.name: BROWSER_ACTION
actions.description: Control a Chromium-based browser through the local runtime. This action opens or connects to a browser session, navigates pages, clicks elements, types into forms, reads DOM state, executes JavaScript, waits for conditions, and manages tabs.

actions.name: CALL_MCP_TOOL
actions.description: Calls a tool from an MCP server to perform a specific task

actions.name: CHECK_CLOUD_CREDITS
actions.description: Check ElizaCloud credit balance, container costs, and estimated remaining runtime.

actions.name: CHECK_PAYMENT
actions.description: Check if payment has been received for the current reading session.

actions.name: CLAUDE_CODE_WORKBENCH_LIST
actions.description: List available Claude Code workbench workflows.

actions.name: CLAUDE_CODE_WORKBENCH_RUN
actions.description: Run an allowlisted repo workflow through the Claude Code workbench service.

actions.name: CLEAR_GRAPH
actions.description: Clear all entities and relationships from the graph.

actions.name: CLEAR_LINEAR_ACTIVITY
actions.description: Clear the Linear activity log

actions.name: COMMANDS_LIST
actions.description: List all available commands with their aliases. Only activates for /commands or /cmds slash commands.

actions.description: Get statistics about the current relational data graph.

actions.description: Create a new entity with a type and name. Entities are the nodes in our relational graph.

actions.name: CREATE_LINEAR_COMMENT

exampleCalls.user: Use CREATE_LINEAR_COMMENT with the provided parameters.

actions.name: custom-generate-music
actions.description: Generate music with custom parameters using Suno AI

actions.name: DEACTIVATE_N8N_WORKFLOW
actions.description: Deactivate an n8n workflow to stop it from processing triggers and running automatically. Identifies workflows by ID, name, or semantic description in any language.

actions.name: DEEPEN_READING
actions.description: Provide a deeper interpretation of a specific element in an active reading.

actions.name: DELETE_ENTITY
actions.description: Delete the current entity and all its relationships.

exampleCalls.user: Use DELETE_ENTITY with the provided parameters.

actions.name: DELETE_LINEAR_ISSUE
actions.description: Delete (archive) an issue in Linear

actions.name: DELETE_MESSAGE
actions.description: Delete a message from a Discord channel

actions.name: DELETE_N8N_WORKFLOW
actions.description: Delete an n8n workflow permanently. This action cannot be undone. Identifies workflows by ID, name, or semantic description in any language.

actions.name: DELETE_PLAYLIST
actions.description: Delete a saved playlist after confirmed:true. Works best in DMs to avoid flooding group chats.

exampleCalls.user: Use DELETE_PLAYLIST with the provided parameters.

actions.name: DEXSCREENER_BOOSTED_TOKENS
actions.description: Get boosted (promoted/sponsored) tokens from DexScreener, showing tokens with paid promotional boosts

actions.name: DEXSCREENER_CHAIN_PAIRS

actions.name: DEXSCREENER_NEW_PAIRS

actions.name: DEXSCREENER_SEARCH
actions.description: Search for tokens or trading pairs on DexScreener by name, symbol, or contract address

actions.name: DEXSCREENER_TOKEN_INFO
actions.description: Get detailed information about a specific token including price, volume, liquidity, and trading pairs from DexScreener

actions.name: DEXSCREENER_TOKEN_PROFILES
actions.description: Get latest token profiles from DexScreener including social links, descriptions, and project information

actions.name: DEXSCREENER_TRENDING
actions.description: Get trending tokens from DexScreener based on volume, price changes, and trading activity

actions.name: DOWNLOAD_MUSIC
actions.description: Download music to the local library without playing it. Requires confirmed:true before fetching and saving.

actions.name: EDIT_MESSAGE
actions.description: Edit an existing message in a Discord channel

actions.name: extend-audio
actions.description: Extend the duration of an existing audio generation

actions.name: FETCH_FEED_TOP
actions.description: Fetch the home timeline from X and return the top-N tweets ranked by engagement (likes + retweets * 2).

actions.name: FILE_ACTION

actions.name: lp_management
actions.description: Manages Liquidity Pool (LP) operations including: onboarding for LP management, depositing tokens into pools, withdrawing from pools, showing LP positions, concentrated liquidity positions with custom price ranges, checking APR/yield, setting auto-rebalance preferences, and finding best pools. Use this action when users mention: liquidity, LP, pools, APR, yield, deposit, withdraw, concentrated, price range, narrow range, degenai, ai16z, SOL pairs, or want help getting started with LP management.

actions.name: MANAGE_ISSUES
actions.description: Manage GitHub issues for a repository.

actions.name: manage_raydium_positions
actions.description: Automatically manage Raydium positions by rebalancing them when they drift too far from the pool price

actions.name: MANAGE_SHOPIFY_CUSTOMERS
actions.description: List and search customers in a connected Shopify store.

actions.name: MANAGE_SHOPIFY_INVENTORY
actions.description: Check inventory levels and list store locations. Stock adjustments require confirmed:true.

actions.name: MANAGE_SHOPIFY_ORDERS
actions.description: List recent orders and check order status. Fulfillment requires confirmed:true.

actions.name: MANAGE_SHOPIFY_PRODUCTS
actions.description: List and search Shopify products. Product creation and updates require confirmed:true.

actions.name: MANAGE_WINDOW
actions.description: Manage desktop windows — list all visible windows, bring a window to the front,

actions.name: MC_ATTACK
actions.description: Attack an entity by numeric entityId (from MC_WORLD_STATE.nearbyEntities).

actions.name: MC_CHAT
actions.description: Send a chat message in Minecraft as the bot

actions.name: MC_CONNECT
actions.description: Connect the Mineflayer bot to a Minecraft server

actions.name: MC_CONTROL
actions.description: Set a control state (e.g. forward/back/left/right/jump/sprint/sneak). Provide JSON {control,state,durationMs?} or 'forward true 1000'.

actions.name: MC_DIG
actions.description: Dig/break the block at (x y z). Provide coordinates like '10 64 -20' or JSON {"x":10,"y":64,"z":-20}.

actions.name: MC_DISCONNECT
actions.description: Disconnect the Mineflayer bot from the Minecraft server

actions.name: MC_GOTO
actions.description: Pathfind to a target (x y z). Provide coordinates like '10 64 -20' or JSON {"x":10,"y":64,"z":-20}.

actions.name: MC_LOOK
actions.description: Look to yaw/pitch (radians). Provide 'yaw pitch' or JSON {yaw,pitch}.

actions.name: MC_PLACE
actions.description: Place the currently-held block onto a reference block face. Provide 'x y z face' (face=up/down/north/south/east/west) or JSON {x,y,z,face}.

actions.name: MC_SCAN
actions.description: Scan nearby blocks. Optional JSON input: {"blocks":["oak_log"],"radius":16,"maxResults":32}. If omitted, scans for any non-air blocks.

actions.name: MC_STOP
actions.description: Stop pathfinding / movement goals.

actions.name: MC_WAYPOINT_DELETE
actions.description: Delete a named waypoint (message text is the name).

actions.name: MC_WAYPOINT_GOTO
actions.description: Pathfind to a named waypoint (message text is the name).

actions.name: MC_WAYPOINT_LIST
actions.description: List saved waypoints.

actions.name: MC_WAYPOINT_SET
actions.description: Save the bot's current position as a named waypoint (message text is the name).

actions.name: MODELS_COMMAND
actions.description: List available AI models and providers. Only activates for /models slash command.

actions.name: MODIFY_EXISTING_N8N_WORKFLOW
actions.description: Load an existing deployed n8n workflow for modification.

actions.name: MULTIVERSE_ADD
actions.description: Performs addition in the multiverse where numbers behave differently based on dimensional constants (prime, quantum, or chaos).

exampleCalls.user: Use MULTIVERSE_ADD with the provided parameters.

actions.name: MULTIVERSE_DIVIDE
actions.description: Performs division in the multiverse where infinity and zero have special meanings (safe, infinite, or golden).

exampleCalls.user: Use MULTIVERSE_DIVIDE with the provided parameters.

actions.name: MULTIVERSE_MODULO
actions.description: Performs modulo operation in the multiverse with cyclical dimensional properties (cyclical, spiral, or fractal).

exampleCalls.user: Use MULTIVERSE_MODULO with the provided parameters.

actions.name: MULTIVERSE_MULTIPLY
actions.description: Performs multiplication across dimensional boundaries with exotic number behaviors (fibonacci, exponential, or harmonic).

exampleCalls.user: Use MULTIVERSE_MULTIPLY with the provided parameters.

actions.name: MULTIVERSE_POWER
actions.description: Raises numbers to powers in the multiverse with dimensional effects (standard, imaginary, or recursive).

exampleCalls.user: Use MULTIVERSE_POWER with the provided parameters.

actions.name: MULTIVERSE_SQRT
actions.description: Takes square root in the multiverse with dimensional variations (positive, complex, or quantum).

exampleCalls.user: Use MULTIVERSE_SQRT with the provided parameters.

actions.name: MULTIVERSE_SUBTRACT
actions.description: Performs subtraction in the multiverse where negative numbers might not exist in some dimensions (absolute, mirror, or void).

exampleCalls.user: Use MULTIVERSE_SUBTRACT with the provided parameters.

actions.name: NOSTR_PUBLISH_PROFILE

actions.name: NOSTR_SEND_DM
actions.description: Send an encrypted direct message via Nostr (NIP-04)

actions.name: PAUSE_MUSIC
actions.description: Pause the currently playing track (hold playback). Use whenever the user asks to pause music or audio.

actions.name: PLAY_AUDIO
actions.description: Start playing a new song: provide a track name, artist, search words, or a media URL.

actions.name: PLAY_MUSIC_QUERY
actions.description: Handle any complex music query that requires understanding and research, then queue the selected track after confirmed:true. Supports: artist queries (first single, latest song, similar artists, popular songs, nth album), temporal (80s, 90s, specific years), genre/mood/vibe, activities (workout, study, party), charts/trending, albums, movie/game/TV soundtracks, lyrics/topics, versions (covers, remixes, acoustic, live), and more. Uses Wikipedia, music databases, and web search to find the right music.

actions.name: TASK_CONTROL
actions.description: Pause, stop, resume, continue, archive, or reopen a coordinator task thread while preserving the durable thread history.

actions.name: TASK_HISTORY
actions.description: Query coordinator task history without stuffing raw transcripts into model context. Use this for active work, yesterday/last-week summaries, topic search, counts, and thread detail lookup.

actions.name: TASK_SHARE
actions.description: Discover the best available way to view or share a task result, including artifacts, live preview URLs, workspace paths, and environment share capabilities.

actions.name: TERMINAL_ACTION
actions.description: Execute terminal commands and manage lightweight terminal sessions through the computer-use service. This includes connect, execute, read, type, clear, close, and the upstream execute_command alias.

actions.name: TOGGLE_SKILL
actions.description: Enable or disable an installed skill. Say 'enable <skill>' or 'disable <skill>'.

actions.name: TRANSFER_TO_INPUT

actions.description: List all Twitch channels the bot is currently in

actions.name: TWITCH_SEND_MESSAGE
actions.description: Send a message to a Twitch channel

actions.name: UNINSTALL_SKILL
actions.description: Uninstall a non-bundled skill. Bundled skills cannot be removed.

actions.name: USE_COMPUTER
actions.description: Control the local desktop. This action can inspect the current screen, move the mouse, click, drag, type, press keys, scroll, and perform modified clicks. It is intended for real application interaction when the agent needs to operate the user's computer directly.

actions.name: USE_SKILL
actions.description: Invoke an enabled skill by slug. The skill's instructions or script run and the result returns to the conversation.

actions.name: WEB_SEARCH
actions.description: Perform a web search to find information related to the message.
